summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AdvantEdge360 business operations suite. Backend APIs fully functional (15/15 tests passed). Frontend authentication and core features working, but Tasks page has React Select component bug preventing full workflow testing.

ui_bugs.issue: React SelectItem error: 'must have a value prop that is not an empty string' causing Tasks page to crash
ui_bugs.selector: Select.Item components in task creation form
ui_bugs.error_details: Error occurs when navigating to /tasks page, preventing task creation, Kanban/list views, and subsequent time tracking functionality

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Backend Proposals CRUD and workflow (create, approve, convert)
Frontend Projects (create projects, form validation, data persistence)
Frontend Proposals (create, approve, convert to project workflow)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical React Select component bug in TasksPage preventing Tasks functionality. The Select.Item components need non-empty string values. Once fixed, Tasks, Kanban views, and Time Tracking features will be testable.

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (6/8 major features working - Tasks page blocked by Select bug)
